docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HYMAN, SCOTT J. AS TO DEFENDANT AIG/NEW HAMPSHIRE INSURANCE CO. MECHANICAL BREAKDOWN ADMIN.,INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIG/NEW HAMPSHIRE INSURANCE CO.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM MECHANICAL BREAKDOWN ADMINISTRATOR FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HYMAN, SCOTT J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIG/NEW HAMPSHIRE INSURANCE CO. MECHANICAL BREAKDOWN ADMIN.,INC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $49.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,549.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
STATEMENT RE: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY SCOTT J.HYMAN AND FILESTAMPED COPY MAILED OUT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT AIG/NEW HAMPSHIRE INSURANCE CO.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MECHANICAL BREAKDOWN ADMIN.,INC.
